rankings.reason: Perfectly captures the futuristic 2050 vision by blending traditional Japanese aesthetics with seamless AI and drone integration.
Strong focus on high-tech convenience and immersive digital experiences, though it lacks the cultural depth of Option D.
Offers many amenities but feels like a collection of current-day features rather than a truly futuristic 2050 experience.
Fails to meet the futuristic criteria, focusing instead on negative, outdated security procedures and stressful travel experiences.
